boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Monitor-only no-block permits release only on exact match of name, country, tax ID, account, and disposition.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: FLAG-TES-074 states monitoring flag remains visible with no tax ID or account disposition; CLR-TES-074 lists account ending 7025 while payment uses 7205; STD-TES-074-P requires exact match.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Visible flag with no tax/account disposition and account mismatch (7205 vs 7025) leaves boundary open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Clearance and flag records must align exactly before release; residual flag blocks execution.

critical_features_preserved: account number as critical blocker (7205 vs 7025)
final_answer: ESCALATE. The payment uses account 7205 (PAY-TES-074), but the clearance CLR-TES-074 specifies account 7025. The sanctions flag FLAG-TES-074 remains visible with no disposition recorded, while CLR-TES-074 has a 'monitor-only no-block' disposition. Policy STD-TES-074-P requires an exact match for closure. Resolution requires authoritative confirmation on whether CLR-TES-074 clearance extends to account 7205 and whether FLAG-TES-074 is superseded by CLR-TES-074's disposition for this transaction. Until these are resolved, the source boundary remains open.
open_blockers: residual sanctions flag FLAG-TES-074 versus exact clearance CLR-TES-074: CLR-TES-074 disposition is monitor-only no-block but applies to account ending 7025; FLAG-TES-074 has no tax ID or account disposition recorded; PAY-TES-074 uses account 7205; resolution requires authoritative confirmation that CLR-TES-074 clearance either (a) extends to account 7205 or (b) does not apply to this payment; partial resolution insufficient for ALLOW
